blocks.body: Prepositional Passive is the passive state with verbs that require a preposition: look after, speak to, pay for, laugh at. In the passive voice, the preposition remains with the verb: "The children were looked after".

{ "title": "6. Short summary", "items": [ "Prepositional Passive: be + V3 + preposition (preposition at the end).", "Приклади: be looked after, be spoken to, be paid for, be laughed at.", "Phrasal verbs also form the passive: be called off, be broken into.", "Do not delete or move the preposition/participle!", "Agent (by + performer) can be added as needed.", "Typical verbs: look after, speak to, pay for, deal with, take care of." ] }
